title: Pan-Seared Irish Pork Chops
description: A hearty and flavorful dish from Ireland, searing pork chops to perfection in a rustic skillet.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Add oil to skillet and sear pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side, until browned.
Remove pork chops from skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add garlic and onion to skillet. Cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add thyme to skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return pork chops to skillet and spoon sauce over them.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until pork chops reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Serve with rustic bread and spoon remaining sauce over the top.
